---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  contents: publications.yml
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: "YYYY"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
  fields: [title, author_text, description, date, categories]
---

You can also find my research on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Vu2km0AAAAAJ).

::: {#main-listing}
:::
